chosen: The 2x2 growth diagnostic: plot your business on lead volume vs. response speed to find out whether you have an acquisition problem or a leak problem before spending on more ads
rejected: Another self-scoring version of the four-system method (already shipped as a mental model and a forensic diagnostic)
Objection handling for automation fears (already covered this cycle)
Instagram 2026 algorithm/carousel stats recap (too meta, not owner-actionable)
Named framework version of the four systems (already shipped)

chosen: HBR's 'Short Life of Online Sales Leads' study (2,241 companies, 7x/60x qualification odds) used as third-party evidence for speed-to-lead, tied to industry benchmarking on response times and Black Arrow's automated response capability
rejected: HubSpot 2026 short-form video/content trend recap — interesting but not a revenue action for the owner
Generic 'immediate response' customer-service stat — too close to a stat already used in a past post
Instagram carousel-vs-reels algorithm update — meta content about posting strategy, not the owner's business
